project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

asset.name: mutant_boar_idle
asset.action: subtle idle breathing, slight chest rise, ear twitch, tail micro-sway, standing in place, loopable, side view facing right

negative_hints: Never generate a multi-frame spritesheet from one image prompt.
Preferred path: reference still → video → split frames → video matte-frames (AI).

pipeline.note: character reference still (must pass pure-white validate); save as raw — do NOT trim

pipeline.prompt: Mutated war boar idle animation: subtle breathing motion with chest rise, occasional ear twitches, and micro tail sways while standing in place. Side view facing right, smooth loopable motion. Pure white background throughout. Not a spritesheet.
pipeline.note: Pass image-generate raw PNG to Seedance — never trim/crop before i2v

plan.video_prompt: Mutated war boar idle animation: subtle breathing motion with chest rise, occasional ear twitches, and micro tail sways while standing in place. Side view facing right, smooth loopable motion. Pure white background throughout. Not a spritesheet.
